message:
fix(core): use maybe_quote_ident for UNIQUE constraint columns in render_create_table_sql

Replace unconditional double-quoting (format!("\"{name}\"")) with
maybe_quote_ident(name) for consistency with how column names are quoted
elsewhere in the function. Also fix Parser::new() call to properly
tokenize DDL via Lexer::tokenize(), and add a total-index-count
assertion to the autoindex test to guard against duplicate index entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
